name: MAGNACHIP SEMICONDUCTOR Corp
business: Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation designs and manufactures analog and mixed-signal power semiconductor platform solutions, including Power discrete (MOSFETs, IGBTs) and Power IC products (AC-DC/DC-DC converters, LED drivers, regulators, PMICs). The company sells to consumer, industrial, automotive, communication, and computing end markets. In 2025, total revenues were $178.9 million, with a net loss of $29.7 million.

exposures.sentence: We are a designer and manufacturer of analog and mixed-signal power semiconductor platform solutions for various applications, including industrial, automotive, communication, consumer and computing.

Recently, industrial applications such as power suppliers, e-bikes, photovoltaic inverters, LED lighting, motor drives, and automotive applications such as on board chargers, electric motor drives, electric pumps, DC-DC converters and powertrain inverters in hybrid & battery electric vehicle (HEV & BEV) are further driving growth in power semiconductor applications.

Recently, industrial applications such as power suppliers, e-bikes, photovoltaic inverters, LED lighting, motor drives, and automotive applications such as on board chargers, electric motor drives, electric pumps, DC-DC converters and powertrain inverters in hybrid & battery electric vehicle (HEV & BEV) are further driving growth in power semiconductor applications.

Power Analog Solutions products include metal oxide semiconductor field effect transistors (MOSFETs) and insulated-gate bipolar transistors (IGBTs) for a range of devices, including televisions, smartphones, mobile phones, wearable devices, desktop personal computers (PCs), notebook PCs, tablet PCs, servers, other consumer electronics, as well as automotive and industrial applications such as power suppliers, e-bikes, solar inverters, LED lighting and motor drives.
